dashboard.title: Your tools
dashboard.subtitle: Start by training a voice. More tools coming soon.

voiceCloning.name: Voices
voiceCloning.description: Train your voice and generate audio with any text.

videoGen.name: Video Generation
videoGen.description: Create short videos from text and cloned voice.

videoClone.name: Clone Video
videoClone.description: Your face and cloned voice in lip-synced videos.

socialPublish.name: Auto Publishing
socialPublish.description: Automatically publish your videos to social media.

voiceCloning.title: Generate Voice
voiceCloning.subtitle: Train your voice however you need — announcer, news content, faster or slower. Upload a few minutes of audio and the AI learns your timbre to generate audio with any text.
voiceCloning.empty: You haven't trained any voice yet.
voiceCloning.generateAudioSubtitle: Pick a ready voice and generate audio with any text.
voiceCloning.generateAudioEmpty: You don't have a ready voice yet. Train a voice first.
voiceCloning.stockCredit: FastCloner catalog voices, trained from the public CML-TTS (UFG/CEIA), MLS and LibriTTS-R collections — CC-BY 4.0 license.

deleteVoice.title: Delete — irreversible action
deleteVoice.wholeDesc: Removes EVERYTHING: uploaded audio, the LoRA, generated audio, references and all database records. This cannot be undone.
deleteVoice.loraDesc: Keeps the uploaded audio. The voice goes back to "ready to train" and you can retrain without uploading audio again.
deleteVoice.confirmLabel: To confirm, type the voice name:

paywall.bodyNoCredits: Training a voice costs {cost} credits and you have {balance}. Buy a pack to continue — audio generation with ready voices stays available.
paywall.bodyNoPlan: You don't have an active plan. Voice training is part of the plan: subscribe to unlock 100,000 credits per month and train your voice.

voiceCloningNew.title: New voice
voiceCloningNew.subtitle: Upload at least 20 minutes of you talking. More is better.
voiceCloningNew.consent: I declare this voice is mine or I have explicit authorization to use it.

rules.title: Requirements
rules.variety: Variety in tone, words and rhythm

dropzone.title: Drag files or an entire folder
dropzone.hint: MP3, WAV, M4A, MP4, AAC, FLAC, OGG · up to 20 files · non-audio is ignored

errors.overMax: Maximum of {max} minutes of audio per training — remove some files (the excess does not improve the voice).
errors.allDuplicates: All selected files are already in the list
errors.partialDup: {duplicates} file(s) were already in the list and ignored
errors.partialAddBoth: {duplicates} duplicate(s) + {ignored} over the limit were ignored
errors.uploadFailed: {count} file(s) failed to upload. Try again.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Access your account to clone voice and generate audio.

signup.title: Create account
signup.subtitle: Create your free account and start cloning your voice.
signup.checkEmail: We sent a code to your email. Check your inbox.

forgot.title: Recover password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to create a new password.
forgot.sent: If this email has an account, you'll receive a link to reset your password. Check your inbox (and spam).

reset.title: New password
reset.subtitle: Choose your new password.
reset.expired: This link expired or was already used. Request a new one.
reset.samePassword: The new password must be different from the current one.
reset.weak: Password too short: use at least 8 characters.

errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before signing in.

metadata.title: FastCloner — Your face. Your voice. At scale.
metadata.description: AI voice and face cloning, automatic editing and finished videos. 30 videos in 15 minutes — no set, no camera, no editor.

hero.description: The machine that does what you deserve. Voice and face cloning, automatic editing and finished videos at scale — no set, no camera, no editor.
hero.microcopy: For doctors, lawyers and independent creators. For those whose time matters.

showcase.caption: Generated in 12 minutes · Premium Avatar · Cloned voice · Automatic captions

voice.title: Your voice.
voice.body: A 30-second sample. From it, every video in the batch speaks in your timbre — keeping prosody, pauses and accent. PT, EN, ES.

face.title: Your face.
face.em: Without you in front of the camera.
face.body: Consistent visual identity across every video — no set, no lighting, no shooting. Vertical for Reels and Shorts, horizontal for YouTube.

edit.title: Cuts, trims, captions.
edit.body: From script to final cut. Cuts on the rhythm of speech, synced captions and suggested b-roll — you just approve.

output.title: 30 videos ready.
output.body: A full batch, captioned and exported in 4K. Open the panel, pick the approved ones and publish. A professional shouldn't become a video editor.

script.l2: Three mistakes that cost you dearly in your contract.
script.l5: But it's where 8 out of 10 lawsuits begin.

pro.name: Pro
pro.desc: Your cloned voice and hours of audio, for one price.
feats: Create as many voices as you need

footer.tagline: Your face, your voice, at scale. AI video for those whose time matters.

page.title: Generate Image
page.description: Upload your photo, describe the scene, and generate an image of yourself in any setting — keeping your face. Download it or save it for later.
page.lockedTitleSubscribed: Not enough credits to generate an image
page.lockedBodySubscribed: Generating an image costs from {min} credits (1K) and you have {credits}. Buy a pack to continue.
page.lockedBodyUnsubscribed: You don't have an active plan. Generating images uses plan credits: subscribe to unlock 100,000 credits per month and create your images.

errors.invalidFiles: Upload image files (JPG, PNG, or WEBP).
errors.maxPhotosIgnored: Maximum of {max} photos — some were skipped.

generating.label: Generating your image…
generating.hint: It can take from a few seconds to ~1 min. You can follow it in the history below.

refs.label: 1. Your photos (reference)
refs.hint: Upload 1 or more photos of the SAME person — the more angles and expressions, the better the likeness. The result keeps the face from these photos. Use sharp, well-lit photos.
refs.dropzone: Click or drag your photos here
refs.formats: JPG, PNG or WEBP · up to {max} photos

idea.label: 2. Your idea (optional)
idea.hint: Describe what you want (e.g. 'me on a beach at sunset, professional photo style'). Click Generate prompt and the AI builds a consistent prompt for you.
idea.placeholder: E.g. me in a suit in a modern office, professional photo…

prompt.label: 3. Prompt
prompt.hint: The text describing the image to generate (English works best). You can type it right here or use the button above. Edit it as much as you like.
prompt.placeholder: A photorealistic portrait of the person in the reference photo…

aspect.label: 4. Aspect ratio
aspect.hint: The image format. 'Auto' lets the model choose (output at 1K). Vertical 9:16 for Stories/Reels, Square 1:1 for the feed, etc.

hints.auto: The model picks the best ratio (output at 1K).

resolution.label: 5. Resolution
resolution.hint: The image quality/size. The higher, the sharper — and the more credits. 4K is not available in 'Auto' or Square (1:1).
resolution.unavailable: Not available for this aspect ratio

hints.1K: Default — fast and cheap. Great for social media.
hints.4K: Maximum resolution. Not available for square (1:1) or auto.

submit.balance: You have {credits} credits · this one costs {cost}.
submit.minNotice: You have {credits} credits. You need at least {min} to generate an image (1K).

history.empty: No images yet. Generate your first one above and it will show up here.
history.deleteWarning: This action is irreversible. It removes the image from storage and from the history.

animate.retryHint: Want a different motion? Adjust the prompt below and generate again (new credit cost).
animate.generatingHint: It can take a few minutes. You can leave and come back.
animate.movementLabel: Desired motion (in your language — we translate it for you)

bronze.label: Bronze
bronze.blurb: Fast and affordable. Good for volume.

plans.tagline: AI voice cloning, unlimited for your content.
features: Clone your voice with just a few minutes of audio
API to plug into your workflows
7-day guarantee — cancel and get a refund

paymentApproved.intro: We received your purchase confirmation. Access unlocks automatically in moments — just sign in with the same email you used to buy.
paymentApproved.step1: Click the button below and sign in with Google.
paymentApproved.step2: Use the same email from your purchase — that's how we unlock your access and credits.
paymentApproved.step3: Done: clone your voice and start generating audio.
paymentApproved.supportHint: Just paid and still locked? Wait a few moments and refresh. If it persists, contact

paymentPending.title: Almost there!
paymentPending.intro: We received your order. As soon as the payment is confirmed, your access unlocks automatically and you get a confirmation email.
paymentPending.pixDesc: confirmation usually lands within a few minutes.
paymentPending.boletoDesc: may take up to a few business days after payment.
paymentPending.cardDesc: under anti-fraud review — usually clears in minutes.

supportError.title: Oops, something went wrong
supportError.body: We couldn't {action}. The error was logged on our side — try again in a few minutes.
supportError.contact: If it keeps happening, contact support:

help.title: Mary
help.subtitle: FastCloner Assistant
help.greeting: Hi! I'm Mary, FastCloner's assistant. 😊 Tell me what you need — and feel free to paste a screenshot so I can see exactly where you are.
help.imageError: I couldn't read that image — try a PNG or JPG.
help.errorGeneric: Couldn't send right now. Try again in a moment.

dashboard.q2: How do I start cloning my voice?

voices.q1: How do I train my voice?
voices.q2: What audio do I need to upload?
voices.q3: My audio sounds off — what now?

images.q1: How do I generate an image with my face?

images.q3: How do I animate an image?

board.title: TikTok Sales Video
board.description: Upload your product photos, pick who presents it, and the AI creates the sales script, the scenes, and the full video — TikTok-ready, up to 60 seconds.

setup.productHint: Upload 1 to 4 product photos — you can select several at once; different angles help the AI.
setup.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the product and what you want to highlight (optional) — the AI uses this in the script.
setup.personHint: The person who appears in the scenes presenting the product — upload 1 to 6 photos (more angles make the face more faithful in the scenes).
setup.consentLabel: I confirm I have permission to use this person's image.
setup.analyzeLocked: Upload the product photos AND the presenter's photo (with consent checked) to unlock the analysis.
setup.analysisHint: The AI looks at the photos (and what you provided) and builds the sales angle — the base of the script.
setup.wandTitle: The AI improves the current script
setup.scriptMeta: editing by hand is free · {n} words

errors.needPerson: Upload the presenter's photo — the analysis uses both.
errors.needConsent: Confirm the consent about using this person's photo.

voice.title: 5 · The narrating voice (max {max}s)
voice.generating: Generating the audio with your voice…
voice.generatingLong: Generating the audio with your voice… (may take 1-2 min)
voice.attaching: Attaching the audio to the project…
voice.noVoices: You don't have a ready voice yet — train one in Voices, or upload a recorded audio below.
voice.uploadOption: I already recorded the product audio
voice.uploadHint: MP3/WAV/M4A/OGG · max {max}s · the transcription of what you say replaces the script

errors.timeout: The generation took too long — check History and try attaching again.
errors.readFile: We couldn't read that audio file.
errors.readDuration: We couldn't read that audio's duration.
errors.tooLong: Your audio is {n}s — in Sales Video the max is {max}s.
errors.uploadFailed: Failed to upload the audio. Please try again.

page.title: Video Clone
page.description: Upload a photo of yourself and an audio — we generate the video of you speaking, with synced lip movement. Perfect for avatars and content.
page.lockedNoCredits: Not enough credits to generate a Video Clone
page.lockedNoCreditsBody: Generating a Video Clone costs from {min} credits and you have {have}. Buy a pack to continue.
page.lockedNoPlanBody: You don't have an active plan. Video Clone uses plan credits: subscribe to unlock your monthly credits.

studio.pickToSeeCost: Pick the photo and the audio to see the cost
studio.generatingHint: Takes a few minutes. You can leave and come back — it's saved in your history.
studio.noSpeech: (we didn't detect speech in this audio)

errors.readAudio: We couldn't read that audio. Try MP3 or WAV.
errors.tooLong: The audio is {n}s — the max is {max}s (1min30s).
errors.failed: The generation failed. Please try again.

pickers.photoHint: 📸 Best result: a photo from the waist up, with a sharp, well-lit face.
pickers.noPhotos: You don't have any generated photos yet.
pickers.createPhoto: Create my photo in the Image Generator →
pickers.createAnotherPhoto: Create another photo in the Image Generator →
pickers.noAudios: You don't have any generated audios (up to {max}s) yet.
pickers.createAudio: Generate an audio with your voice →
pickers.createAnotherAudio: Generate a new audio with your voice →

history.empty: No Video Clone yet. Generate your first one above.
history.inflightHint: — it may take a few minutes. You can leave and come back.
history.deleteBody: This action is irreversible. It removes the video, the photo, and the audio from storage.

videoEdit.title: Automatic recording edit
videoEdit.subtitle: Upload your raw recording — feel free to stumble, repeat and pause. The platform cuts mistakes and silences and returns the finished video, captioned.

pick.title: Upload recording
pick.hint: MP4, MOV or WEBM · up to 15 minutes · up to 1GB

processing.title: Editing your recording…
processing.hint: Cutting mistakes, retakes and silences. This takes a few minutes — you can leave and come back.

errors.start: Couldn't start the edit. Try again.
errors.failed: The edit failed. Your credits were refunded — try again.

unified.title: Video Studio
unified.subtitle: Two questions and the platform builds your video: script, cloned voice, scenes and captions — the way you choose.

q1.title: What are you starting with?
q1.hint: Every path ends in a finished video. Pick what you have in hand right now.

texto.title: I have a text
texto.body: A ready script or just an idea — AI writes it, your cloned voice narrates.

audio.title: I have an audio
audio.body: Recorded by you or generated here — it becomes the video's narration.

video.title: I have a video of me
video.body: Your raw recording: the platform cuts silences and mistakes on its own.

produto.title: I have a product
produto.body: Product photos become a sales script in your voice.

q2.title: How should the video look?
q2.hint: Voice, scenes and captions come with smart defaults — you can change everything later.

body.texto: Your clone avatar speaks the script — no need to record anything.
body.audio: Your clone avatar appears speaking your audio.
body.produto: Your clone avatar presents the product.

body.texto: Faceless video: AI-generated scenes illustrate the narration.
body.audio: Faceless video: AI-generated scenes illustrate your audio.
body.video: AI-generated scenes instead of your image.

body.texto: Your avatar intercut with scenes — the format that holds attention best.
body.audio: Your avatar intercut with AI-generated scenes.
body.video: Your edited recording, intercut with scenes.

page.title: Video Studio
page.subtitle: Record your speech without fear of mistakes — repeat the line as many times as you want. We cut the mistakes, shrink the pauses and return your audio clean, ready to become a video.
page.gateTitleCredits: Not enough credits to use Video Studio
page.gateBodyCredits: Preparing an audio costs {cost} credits and you have {credits}. Buy a pack to continue.
page.gateBodySubscribe: You don't have an active plan. Video Studio uses plan credits: subscribe to unlock your monthly credits.

workspace.micError: Couldn't access the microphone. Check your browser permission.
workspace.step1: 1. Record your speech (feel free to mess up and repeat the line — we cut it)
workspace.listenHint: Listen before sending, if you like.
workspace.paywallAction: prepare your audio in Video Studio

script.label: Script (optional) — the AI writes it in viral documentary format
script.ideaPlaceholder: What's the video idea? E.g.: how I built a system that edits video by itself
script.hint: Read it while recording, your way — improvising is fine. The edit follows what you SAY, not this text.

result.processingTitle: Editing your audio — cutting mistakes and pauses…
result.processingHint: Takes ~1-2 minutes. You can leave and come back — it stays saved in your history.
result.statRemoved: {n, plural, one {# bad take removed} other {# bad takes removed}}
result.scenesCostHint: {cost} cr per NEW scene — scenes from your library come in for free (they're saved forever).
result.scenesGenerating: Generating scenes — {ready}/{total} ready… (~1-3 min per scene)
result.scenesWillUseYours: the assembly will use YOUR scenes.
result.scenesFailed: {n, plural, one {# scene failed to generate.} other {# scenes failed to generate.}}
result.faceLabel: Your presence in the video (face on the opening and closing)
result.faceHint: Optional — without a photo, the video ships with scenes only. Clone Turbo pricing over the opening and closing.
result.faceProcessing: Generating you speaking (opening and closing)… takes a few minutes.
result.faceReady: ✓ Presence ready — you open and close the video speaking.
result.montageLabelScenes: Assemble the video — with your scenes + captions + music
result.montageLabelTest: Test video — assembly + captions + music (fixed scenes)
result.montageProcessing: Assembling the video — J-cuts, pacing and zoom… (~2-4 min)
result.qa: Automatic QA: audio capped at −1dB (no clipping) ✓ · no static shot >2.5s ✓ · AI scenes checked for broken text ✓

history.empty: No audio prepared yet — record your first one above.

paywall.buyPack: Buy a credit pack to continue.
paywall.subscribeVideos: Subscribe to unlock credits and generate your videos.
paywall.subscribeImages: Subscribe to unlock credits and generate your images.
paywall.improveCost: Improving the prompt with AI costs 1 credit.

board.empty: No videos yet. Start by picking one of your audios (up to 1min30s) and let the AI build the scenes.
board.deleteWarning: This action is irreversible. It removes the project and everything it generated.

scenes.intro: The AI will split your script into ~{n} scenes in order, with a visual prompt in Portuguese for each one. You can edit everything later. Generating scenes is free.
scenes.editHint: edit by hand or use the ✨ (1 credit)
scenes.nextHint: When the scenes look good, generate the images below.

images.uploadFailed: Couldn't upload one of the photos. Try again.
images.blockedCount: {n} scene(s) were blocked by content moderation.
images.blockedScene: Content blocked by moderation in this scene.
images.refIntro: Upload 1 to 6 photos of yourself (face or waist up). Recommended: 2–3 angles. This photo becomes the standard and is used in every scene.
images.consent: I understand that the photo(s) I uploaded will be used in every scene, that I must upload a clear photo of myself (face or waist up), and that poor results caused by an unsuitable photo are my responsibility.
images.costHint: Each image costs 12 credits (1K). It can take a few minutes.

videoStage.gate: Generate and finish all scene images to unlock video generation.

grid.title: Scene videos
grid.providerIssue: The video service is temporarily unavailable (provider limit). We've already notified support automatically. Once it's back, just click Regenerate — you won't lose your prompt.
grid.generatingHint: — it can take a few minutes. You can leave and come back.
grid.wandTitle: New AI prompt (Sonnet sees the image): 15 credits + the video

tiers.title: Choose the video model
tiers.intro: These three samples were generated from the same image and the same prompt below — only the model changes. See which one got closest to what you want and pick it. The cost is per scene.
tiers.backgroundHint: Generation runs in the background and can take a few minutes. You can leave and come back — progress is saved.

final.title: Final video
final.renderingHint: Joining the clips with the audio. It can take a few minutes — you can leave and come back.
final.intro: Joins all clips in scene order with your audio, adds synced captions, and trims to the length of the narration.
final.approve: Approve videos and assemble the final cut
final.waitClips: Wait for all clips to be ready.

audioPick.empty: You don't have any audios up to {s}s yet. Generate an audio with your script first and it will show up here.

audioUpload.unreadable: We couldn't read that audio file.
audioUpload.noDuration: We couldn't read the duration of that audio.
audioUpload.tooLong: Your audio is {dur} — the maximum is {max}. Trim the audio and try again.
audioUpload.putFailed: Couldn't upload the audio. Try again.
audioUpload.title: Or upload your own voice
audioUpload.formats: MP3, WAV, M4A, OGG or FLAC · max {max} · the scene script comes from what's spoken

pages.newIntro: Select an audio you've already generated (with the script). It defines the video's scenes. 1min30s limit for now.
pages.historyIntro: Turn one of your audios into a full video: the script becomes scenes, images and clips, assembled with captions at the end. Start with an audio up to 1min30s.

recorderImport.loaded: {count, plural, one {# Recorder clip loaded automatically.} other {# Recorder clips loaded automatically.}}
recorderImport.skipped: ({skipped} shorter clip(s) were left out — limit of {max} files.)

recorder.title: Record voice
recorder.clipping: Audio is clipping — move the mic away or speak more softly
recorder.noisy: Noisy environment — clone quality drops. Find a quiet spot (no TV, street noise or AC).
recorder.deadMic: I can't hear you — the microphone seems muted. Check that the right mic is selected in your browser/system settings and that it isn't turned off.
recorder.recordingAuto: Recording… stops on its own after {seconds}s of silence
recorder.keepRecording: You can keep recording to improve it — the cleaner the audio, the better the cloned voice.

errors.micDenied: Microphone permission denied — allow the mic in your browser and try again.
errors.muteClip: The recording came out silent (no voice captured) and was discarded. Check your microphone and record again.

script.pickPrompt: Pick a theme to generate your reading script.
script.generatingHint: The AI is writing your text
script.error: Couldn't generate the script right now.
script.title: Pick a theme
script.subtitle: The AI writes a text in that style for you to read and record.

picker.pickPrompt: Pick a theme to generate your reading script.
picker.generatingHint: The AI is writing your text
picker.error: Couldn't generate the script right now.
picker.title: Pick a theme
picker.subtitle: The AI writes a text in that style for you to read and record.

history.empty: No audio generated yet. Generate audio with a ready voice and it will show up here.

deleteModal.title: Delete {n, plural, one {# audio} other {# audios}}?
deleteModal.body: This action is irreversible. It removes the audio from storage and from your history.

generator.placeholder: Hi, this is a test of my cloned voice…
generator.savedNote: All audio is also saved to your History.

panel.awaitingBody: Audio validated and stored in R2. Click below to kick off training on RunPod (~15-30 min). You can close this tab — the UI updates on its own.
panel.rejectedBody: These audio files don't reach the 20-minute minimum. Upload more audio in a new voice.
panel.readyBody: LoRA trained and stored. Listen to the sample below — if you like it, just generate.
panel.trainingBody: Pipeline running on RunPod (~15-30 min). Refreshing every {s}s.
panel.failedFallback: Something went wrong during training. Try again — if it persists, contact support.

deleteVoice.title: Delete — irreversible action
deleteVoice.voiceOptionDesc: Removes EVERYTHING: uploaded audio, the LoRA, generated audio, references and all database records. Cannot be recovered.
deleteVoice.loraOptionDesc: Keeps your uploaded audio. The voice goes back to "ready to train" and you can retrain without uploading again.
deleteVoice.confirmLabel: To confirm, type the voice name:
deleteVoice.dangerBody: Deleting is irreversible. It removes files from storage (R2) and database records — this can't be undone.

list.noCreditsBody: Training a voice costs {cost} credits and you have {total}. Buy a pack to continue — generating audio with ready voices stays available.
list.subscribeBody: You don't have an active plan. Training a voice is part of the plan: subscribe to unlock 100,000 credits per month and train your voice.

generatePage.title: Synthesis
generatePage.subtitle: Type your text and generate. The voice reference is set automatically from your training.

scriptPage.title: Script
scriptPage.subtitle: Read this script out loud while recording, varying your tone in each block — that's how the model learns your voice's range. Don't like it? Generate another. Want to read on paper? Download or print it.

sidebar.lockTraining: You need {n} credits to train a voice.
sidebar.lockGenerateAudio: Train a voice first to generate audio.

apiDocs.sampleText: Hello, this is a test of my voice.
apiDocs.pollComment:
# Repeat every ~30s until "status": "ready".
# The response then includes "audio_url" (.mp3 link, valid for 1h).
apiDocs.title: How to use (cURL)
apiDocs.readyVoices: Your ready voices (use the ID in the call)
apiDocs.noReadyVoices: No voice ready yet. Train a voice first.

apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.description: Use a key to generate audio outside the site (cURL, n8n, scripts). The key is tied to your account and only accesses your voices.
apiKeys.copyOnce: Copy it now — the key won't be shown again
apiKeys.empty: No keys yet. Create your first one above.
apiKeys.revokeBody: Anyone using this key stops working immediately. This action is irreversible.

buyCredits.connectionError: Connection error while starting the purchase.
buyCredits.footnote: Payment via Stripe. One-time credits never expire.

cancelSub.doneBody: Your access continues until the end of the period you already paid for. Thanks for the feedback — it helps us improve.
cancelSub.title: Before you go…
cancelSub.body: Feel free to cancel. Just tell us why (optional) — it helps us improve.

consent.title: Before you continue
consent.subtitle: Read and accept our terms to use the platform.
consent.declaration: I declare that I have read and agree to the Terms of Use, the Privacy Policy and the Usage Policy.

deleteAccount.warning: Deleting your account erases all your audio, cancels your subscription and is irreversible. To come back, you'll have to create a new account.
deleteAccount.noUndo: This action cannot be undone. When you delete:
deleteAccount.consequence1: all generated audio will be erased;
deleteAccount.consequence3: you'll need to create a new account to come back.
